outlook.volatilityExpectation: High directional volatility; mean reversion likely towards 652.
outlook.summary: Spot price has broken above the visible strike range (654), leaving massive Open Interest at 652 as the primary structural magnet. Dealers are likely short gamma on the rally, which accelerates upside but makes 652 a strong pullback target.

levels.motivazione: Massive OI dominance in Weekly (15.9k) combined with strong 0DTE (2.5k) and Monthly presence creates a powerful structural magnet below spot.
Highest OI in 0DTE (3.8k) confluence with Weekly (1k) acts as immediate structural support for the parabolic move.
Highest strike in Monthly dataset with 1.3k OI, acting as the last friction point before spot.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Suppressed: Positive gamma environment dampens volatility.
outlook.summary: Market is in a positive gamma regime (Spot >> Gamma Flip). Dealers will suppress volatility, selling into rallies and buying dips. Strong resistance cluster identified between 24300-24500.

levels.motivazione: High 0DTE volume node (59) just below spot acts as initial support. Dealers short calls here provide stability.
Major 0DTE (115) and Monthly (102) Call concentration. Confluence of short-term and structural resistance.
Resonance across all expiries: 0DTE (192), Weekly (43), Monthly (32). Primary target for dealer hedging flows.
Dominant Weekly (148) and Monthly (40) resistance. Psychological level capping upside.
